‘The Odyssey’ takes $16.7m in North American previews, $22.2m from first international markets"},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9wq5g5p174o","title":"Oscars ceremony moving to new home outside Hollywood","content":"The Oscars will leave their longtime home in the heart of Hollywood and relocate to a more central Los Angeles venue beginning in 2029 - the same year its broadcast is set to move to YouTube.
The eight-mile (12km) move to the Peacock Theater, which will host the event until at least 2039, will push the ceremony away from the iconic Hollywood sign.
Before moving to the Hollywood neighbourhood of Los Angeles, the Oscars for years were held in a central location at the Dorothy Chandler Pavilion and Shrine Auditorium.
They will continue to be held at the Dolby Theatre at Ovation Hollywood and televised live on ABC when the centennial ceremony is held in 2028."},{"url":"https://www.thegoldknight.com/2026/03/oscars-move-downtown-la-live-2029.html","title":"Oscars to move downtown to L.A. LIVE in 2029 for 101st Academy Awards | The Gold Knight - Latest Academy Awards news and insight","content":"The show will be held at the venue currently known as the Peacock Theater and remain there through at least 2039.
The move marks a significant shift for Hollywood's biggest night, which has been held at the Dolby Theatre since 2002.
In recent years, The Academy has faced space limitations at the Dolby Theatre, particularly as its membership has grown to more than 11,000 members.
The new venue offers increased capacity (from 3,400 seats to 7,100 seats) and greater flexibility in how the show is staged, from audience layout to backstage operations.
There have been rare exceptions, including the 93rd Academy Awards in 2021, which were held at Union Station Los Angeles during the pandemic, but the Dolby era has defined the modern Oscars for more than two decades.
After several years visiting your website and getting the award season lists especially your Oscar Movie Checklist, I wanna say thank you for your design and commitment you put in every single year and sharing them with us.
Winners for the 98th Academy Awards were unveiled live from the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, California, on March 15."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/oscars-relocating-l-a-live-peacock-theater-1236548001/","title":"Oscars Relocating to L.A. Live in 2029","content":"In 2029, the Oscars ceremony will be relocated from the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, where it has been held since 2002, to the Peacock Theater at L.A.
Live in downtown Los Angeles, the home of the Primetime Emmy Awards since 2008.
That 2029 Oscars — the Academy’s 101st — will also be the first broadcast via YouTube, as part of another deal struck late last year.
AEG also “will collaborate closely with the Academy to incorporate bespoke design elements needed to accommodate the Oscars ceremony,” according to the announcement."}]}

See where – NBC Los Angeles","content":"# The Oscars will move from Hollywood to downtown Los Angeles in 2029. ## L.A. Live, a venue adjacent to Crypto.com Arena, will be the home of the 101st Oscars ceremony. After its centennial in 2028, the Oscars will relocate from its longtime Hollywood home to downtown Los Angeles, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) said Thursday. The Oscars is leaving Hollywood. Well, the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, that is. AMPAS and AEG announced a multi-year partnership that will move \"Hollywood's biggest night\" from the Dolby Theatre at Ovation Hollywood to L.A. Live in Downtown Los Angeles in 2029. The 4-million-square-foot sports and entertainment hub, which debuted in 2007, is adjacent to the Crypto.com Arena and about 9 miles from the Dolby Theatre. AMPAS said the 101st Oscars ceremony will be held in a 7,100-seat space currently known as the Peacock Theater at L.A. Live.","score":0.8909888,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://abc7.com/post/oscars-leave-hollywoods-dolby-theatre-2029-academy-awards-ceremony-moving-new-home-la-live/18781114","title":"Oscars to leave Hollywood's Dolby Theatre in 2029; Academy Awards ceremony moving to new home at LA Live - ABC7 Los Angeles","content":"# Oscars to leave Hollywood's Dolby Theatre in 2029, moving to LA Live. LOS ANGELES (KABC) -- The Oscars will be held at a new venue beginning in 2029, as the ceremony moves from its longtime home at Hollywood's Dolby Theatre to the L.A. Live entertainment complex in downtown Los Angeles, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences and AEG announced on Thursday. The 101st Oscars will be held at the Peacock Theater, where the annual ceremony will remain through 2039, according to a new release. L.A. Live's recently expanded plaza will host red carpet arrivals and activities, and the theater will be the first venue to host the Oscars when it becomes available on YouTube through a deal with the Academy, which also begins in 2029, officials said.
